message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker with completed installer work

This commit synchronizes the Beads issue tracker JSONL export with two
recently completed installer improvements that were tracked during
development.

Closed issues added:

1. ultimate_bug_scanner-6q2: "Installer should rerun after checksum auto-fix"
   - Priority: 1 (critical)
   - Type: task
   - Assignee: codex
   - Resolution: Piped curl|bash rerun now re-execs installer file or
     downloads fresh copy; tested and pushed in commit 29fb76f
   - Impact: Ensures hooks and checks complete cleanly after automatic
     checksum repairs by ubs doctor

2. ultimate_bug_scanner-fln: "Installer smoke test should fail on warnings"
   - Priority: 1 (critical)
   - Type: bug
   - Assignee: codex
   - Problem: Smoke test used `ubs <file> --fail-on-warning --ci --only=js`
     but flags after path were ignored, causing false exit 0
   - Resolution: Moved flags before path so known-bug sample correctly
     triggers non-zero exit

Both issues were part of the installer reliability improvements tracked
in the recent commit series (5b2f0d8, 2ea7487, 29fb76f, 93d820e, fc13e5e).

The JSONL format is the git-portable representation of Beads' SQLite
database, enabling issue history to be tracked alongside code changes
and synchronized across team members via standard git workflows.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
